# `signals` table schema

One row per benchmark trial. Produced by `agent-diagnostics ingest`.

Source of truth: [`src/agent_diagnostics/types.py`](../../src/agent_diagnostics/types.py) (`TrialSignals`).

| Column | Type | Nullable | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-------------|
| trial_id | VARCHAR | no | Stable 32-hex primary key: ``sha256(task_id\|\|config_name\|\|started_at\|\|model)[:32]``. |
| trial_id_full | VARCHAR | no | Full 64-hex SHA-256 of the trial identity key. |
| task_id | VARCHAR | no | Benchmark task identifier (e.g. ``swe-bench-lite-001``). |
| model | VARCHAR | no | Model name that produced the trial (e.g. ``claude-sonnet-4-6``). |
| agent_name | VARCHAR | no | Agent harness name (e.g. ``claude-code``, ``openhands``). |
| config_name | VARCHAR | no | Harness configuration name (e.g. ``baseline``). |
| benchmark | VARCHAR | no | Benchmark suite name (e.g. ``swebench_lite``). |
| reward | DOUBLE | yes | Final verifier reward in [0, 1], or NULL if no verifier result. |
| passed | BOOLEAN | no | True when ``reward > 0``. |
| has_verifier_result | BOOLEAN | no | True when a verifier reward was present. |
| total_turns | BIGINT | no | Total conversational turns recorded in the trajectory. |
| tool_calls_total | BIGINT | no | Total number of tool calls across all turns. |
| search_tool_calls | BIGINT | no | Tool calls classified as search (per tool_registry). |
| edit_tool_calls | BIGINT | no | Tool calls classified as edits (per tool_registry). |
| code_nav_tool_calls | BIGINT | no | Tool calls classified as code navigation. |
| semantic_search_tool_calls | BIGINT | no | Tool calls classified as semantic search. |
| unique_files_read | BIGINT | no | Count of distinct files opened for reading. |
| unique_files_edited | BIGINT | no | Count of distinct files edited or written. |
| files_read_list | VARCHAR[] | no | Sorted list of file paths read during the trial. |
| files_edited_list | VARCHAR[] | no | Sorted list of file paths edited during the trial. |
| error_count | BIGINT | no | Turns where the tool observation contained an error keyword. |
| retry_count | BIGINT | no | Consecutive tool calls with identical function + args. |
| trajectory_length | BIGINT | no | Length of the tool-call sequence. |
| has_result_json | BOOLEAN | no | True when ``result.json`` was present for this trial. |
| has_trajectory | BOOLEAN | no | True when ``trajectory.json`` was present for this trial. |
| duration_seconds | DOUBLE | no | Wall-clock seconds derived from ``started_at``/``finished_at`` (0.0 when unknown). |
| rate_limited | BOOLEAN | no | True when the harness exception indicated rate limiting. |
| exception_crashed | BOOLEAN | no | True when the trial crashed with an exception. |
| patch_size_lines | BIGINT | no | Total lines written across Edit/Write tool calls. |
| tool_call_sequence | VARCHAR[] | no | Ordered list of tool function names across the trial. |
| benchmark_source | VARCHAR | no | How the benchmark field was resolved — ``manifest``, ``directory``, or empty string when unresolved. |
